name: wool_level_complete_title
description: Display lettering reading exactly "Level Complete" in chunky cream felt letters edged with golden yarn stitching, arched over a turquoise knitted ribbon, with one neatly wound celebratory yarn rosette above.
prompt_extra: requested text exactly Level Complete; win-card wide composition; cheerful, plush and highly legible; no extra words

variants.name: rosette
variants.prompt_extra: larger yarn rosette and richer stitched edging

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: simpler ribbon and bolder lettering for phone readability
